posts.name: Ben
posts.text: when I fell in true love for the very first time. I also remember when my heart was broken forever. Even though she still is in my life, she doesn't look at me like she looks at others. The best day of my life was with her. We were watching a movie on a friend's couch while cuddling. After the movie was over we were slowly drifting to sleep together. That was my favorite moment in my entire life. The first time I had ever slept with another living thing. I felt so close to her at that moment. I fear I will never feel that way again.
